subject: CSIT AAI Sim: Impl Service Model Retrieving API
commit_message:

Patch Set 1:

This is going to need some more refactoring of the "so" directory name.
The JJB regex lookup for "so" picks up this change and runs the SO jobs as well.
We had a similar issue before and changed the dir name to "sorch" as the so jobs kept failing, blocking the SWUP changes.
